name: navigate
description: Move your ship to an adjacent sector. Check adjacent-sectors first to find valid destinations.

target_sector_id.description: UUID of the sector to navigate to (must be adjacent)

name: get_adjacent_sectors
description: Get sectors connected to your current location. Use this to plan navigation routes.

name: get_ship_status
description: Get your ship's current state: hull, shields, fuel, cargo capacity, sector location.

name: get_cargo
description: Get your current cargo manifest with quantities and estimated values.

name: get_market
description: Get market summary with commodity prices across all ports. Use this to find profitable trade routes.

name: get_port
description: Get ports in your current sector with their commodity listings and prices.

name: get_map
description: Get the full galaxy map with sector coordinates and connections.

name: buy_commodity
description: Buy a commodity at the current port. Check port info first to get port_id and commodity_id.

port_id.description: UUID of the port to buy from (get from port info)

commodity_id.description: UUID of the commodity to buy

name: sell_commodity
description: Sell a commodity at the current port. Check port info first to get port_id.

port_id.description: UUID of the port to sell at (get from port info)

commodity_id.description: UUID of the commodity to sell

name: refuel
description: Refuel your ship at the current port. Get the port_id from port info first.

port_id.description: UUID of the port to refuel at

name: activate_ship
description: Switch which ship you control. Only works with ships owned by your owner.

ship_id.description: UUID of the ship to activate

name: get_agent_status
description: Get your agent configuration: remaining budget, rate limits, permissions, directive from owner.
